calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR 3689.
Atty. Robert Perkiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dreyer's Grand Ice Cream, with witness Shane Weitzel, who was sworn and examined.

The following exhibits were identified and admitted into evidence:
Exh. 1 - Account Receivable
Exh. 2 - Credit Application

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff DREYER'S GRAND ICE CREAM and against the Defaulted Defendant: PALMETTO RETAILERS INC, A CORPORATION, DBA STUART FINE FOODS as follows:
Damages $77,739.26
Prejudgment Interest $1,725.30
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs, $ 401.00 for a total Judgment of $82,690.56
Judgment signed in open court. Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Continued To Mar-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Continued To Jan-31-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
